groups.name: stress
groups.comment: Larger stress tests targeting algorithmically complex paths: regalloc, splitConstRegisters, splitReg, mergeWaveforms, cwvf compaction, prefetch, command table.

cases.name: if158_cwvf_in_loop_hdawg
cases.comment: IF-158: minimal repro for missing static cwvf in else-arm of in-loop if/else after cwvfr-arm.

cases.name: if159_assignwave_dup_crash_hdawg
cases.comment: IF-159: recon aborts (terminate called without active exception) when binary produces clean 'already assigned index' error.

cases.name: if161_shfqc_setsinephase_shfqc
cases.comment: IF-161: recon rejects setSinePhase on SHFQC sg with 'node sgchannels/0/sines/0/phaseshift doesn't exist'; original compiles fine. Plain SHFSG sg works.

cases.name: if162_assignwave_dual_size_hdawg
cases.comment: IF-162: assignWaveIndex with dual placeholders of different sizes uses the first signal's length instead of the max (same class of bug as IF-157 but on the assignWaveIndex path).

cases.name: if163_repeat_unroll_limit_hdawg
cases.comment: IF-163: recon tries to unroll repeat(1000000) and errors with 'too many iterations to unroll'; original emits a loop instruction.

groups.name: coverage_round_tier1
groups.comment: Phase-62-style coverage round: targets 23 zero-coverage and 31 low-coverage builtins. State-threading variants and arity exercises. See AGENTS.md / IF-199 for context.

groups.name: coverage_round_2_tier2
groups.comment: Coverage round 2: SeqC language features (control flow, compound assigns, inc/dec, arrays, double init, logical ops, block comments). Tier 1 dropped after validation: C-style casts, typed-int functions, and preprocessor are not SeqC features.
